metadata.title: ShifuHealth – Traditional Chinese Medicine | Healing Wisdom by Shifu Qi
metadata.description: Explore Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) with Shifu Qi – your personal TCM expert. Get holistic guidance on nutrition, healing herbs, acupuncture and Qi practices.
metadata.keywords: Traditional Chinese Medicine, TCM, TCM blog, Qi, Yin Yang, Five Elements, TCM nutrition, TCM herbs, acupuncture, moxibustion, TCM diagnosis, tongue diagnosis TCM, pulse diagnosis TCM, Kidney Yang deficiency, holistic health, Shifu Qi

hero.title: The Wisdom of Traditional Chinese Medicine - for your modern life
hero.subtitle: Rediscover ancient healing. Shifu Qi guides you on your path to health and balance.
hero.seoText: ShifuHealth combines thousands of years of Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) – an ancient healing system with over 2,500 years of history – with the deep expertise of Shifu Qi.

tcmIntro.title: What is Traditional Chinese Medicine?
tcmIntro.qi_text: Qi is the vital life energy that flows through your body. When Qi flows freely and in balance, you feel healthy and full of vitality. Blockages can lead to discomfort.
tcmIntro.yinyang_text: Two opposing yet complementary forces - like rest and activity, cold and warmth. Health arises when Yin and Yang are in balance.
tcmIntro.yinyang_quote: "Balance is not a state - it is a dance."
tcmIntro.elements_text: Wood, Fire, Earth, Metal and Water - five transformation phases that connect organs, emotions and seasons.

shifuQi.title: Your Personal TCM Expert: Shifu Qi
shifuQi.body: Describe your symptoms - Shifu Qi analyses them according to TCM principles and gives you grounded recommendations tailored to your individual pattern.
shifuQi.bullet1: Analyses your pattern using TCM principles

fiveElements.title: The Five Elements of TCM
fiveElements.woodText: The Wood element represents growth and renewal. It nourishes creativity and flexibility.
fiveElements.fireText: Fire represents warmth, love and the joy of life. It governs the heart and the spirit.
fiveElements.earthText: Earth stands for stability and nourishment. It is the centre that connects all elements.
fiveElements.metalText: Metal stands for clarity, structure and letting go. It supports breathing and the immune system.
fiveElements.waterText: Water is the source of life. It stands for depth, wisdom and the essence of our vitality.

assistant.metaTitle: Shifu Qi – Your TCM Expert for Traditional Chinese Medicine | ShifuHealth
assistant.metaDescription: Ask Shifu Qi - your personal TCM expert. Get grounded recommendations on nutrition, herbs and lifestyle according to Traditional Chinese Medicine principles.
assistant.infoCard1Text: Shifu Qi uses an extensive TCM knowledge base and explains your symptoms according to Traditional Chinese Medicine principles - clearly and with depth.
assistant.infoCard2Text: No. Shifu Qi provides TCM knowledge for orientation but does not replace a doctor visit. For serious conditions, we recommend a qualified TCM practitioner.
assistant.infoCard3Text: Shifu Qi responds in German and English. More languages will follow in future updates.
